title: ageratina pampalcensis
intro: Ageratina pampalcensis, also known as the Pampalón flower or Hierba de Pampalón, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ageratina pampalcensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
